attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
L0_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
IS_L0_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,   
IS_L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR ,  
IS_L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR , 
IS_L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR  ,
IS_L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR  ,
IS_L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR  ,
IS_L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR  ,
FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
FISCAL_WEEK_NAME,
CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLG,
SALES_REP_NUM,
ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,
IS_SALES_REP_NUM,              
IS_ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,         
BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
SERVICE_FLG,
FMV_FLG,
PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
SOFTWARE_USAGE_TYPE_CD,
SOFTWARE_STACK_CD,
MONETIZATION_TYPE_CD,
SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,
ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,
PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_DESCR,
SALES_ADJ_CD,
MATCH_FLG,
SUM(DV_ACTUAL_AMT),
SUM(DV_AS_PENDING_BKGS_AMT),
SUM(DV_AS_REVENUE_AMT),
SUM(DV_DEBKGS_AMT),
SUM(DV_ORACLE_ACTUAL_AMT),
SUM(DV_POS_AMT),
SUM(DV_DSV_AMT),
SUM(DV_EIS_CM_AMT),
SUM(DV_BKGS_BGM_NET_AMT),
SUM(DV_BKGS_BGM_COST_AMT),
SUM(DV_BGM_AMT),
SUM(DV_BGM_TTL_AMT),
SUM(DV_BKGS_BGM_FX_NET_AMT),
SUM(DV_BGM_FX_AMT),
SUM(DV_BGM_FX_TTL_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_NEW_BGM_NET_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_NEW_BGM_COST_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_NEW_BGM_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_NEW_BGM_TTL_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_NEW_BGM_FX_NET_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_NEW_BGM_FX_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_NEW_BGM_FX_TTL_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_RNWL_BGM_NET_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_RNWL_BGM_COST_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_RNWL_BGM_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_RNWL_BGM_TTL_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_RNWL_BGM_FX_NET_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_RNWL_BGM_FX_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_RNWL_BGM_FX_TTL_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_OTHER_BGM_NET_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_OTHER_BGM_COST_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_OTHER_BGM_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_OTHER_BGM_TTL_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_OTHER_BGM_FX_NET_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_OTHER_BGM_FX_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_OTHER_BGM_FX_TTL_AMT),
SUM(DV_DISC_NET_AMT),
SUM(DV_DISC_LIST_AMT),
SUM(DV_DISC_TTL_AMT),
SUM(DV_DISC_FX_NET_AMT),
SUM(DV_DISC_FX_TTL_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_NEW_DISC_NET_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_NEW_DISC_LIST_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_NEW_DISC_TTL_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_NEW_DISC_FX_NET_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_NEW_DISC_FX_TTL_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_RNWL_DISC_NET_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_RNWL_DISC_LIST_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_RNWL_DISC_TTL_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_RNWL_DISC_FX_NET_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_RNWL_DISC_FX_TTL_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_OTHER_DISC_NET_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_OTHER_DISC_LIST_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_OTHER_DISC_TTL_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_OTHER_DISC_FX_NET_AMT),
SUM(DV_TSS_OTHER_DISC_FX_TTL_AMT),
SUM(DV_ENB_AMT),
SUM(DV_CCP_DISC_AMT),
SUM(DV_NEW_SERVICE_BKGS_AMT),
SUM(DV_RNWL_SERVICE_BKGS_AMT),
SUM(DV_OTHER_CONTRACT_BKGS_AMT),
SUM(DV_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT),
SUM(DV_MULTI_YR_BKGS_AMT),
SUM(DV_LIST_AMT),
SUM(DV_CLD_BKGS_AMT),
TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
SUM(DV_XAAS_BKGS_AMT),
XCAT_FLG,
RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
ELA_FLG,
DV_IS_FLG,
/* Adding New Columns As part of Feb Release */
CASE WHEN SALES_COVERAGE_CODE IN ('NOT REQUIRED','UNKNOWN') THEN 'OTHER' ELSE SALES_COVERAGE_CODE END AS SALES_COVERAGE_CODE, 
CASE WHEN SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CD IN ('NOT REQUIRED','UNKNOWN') THEN 'OTHER' ELSE SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CD END AS SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CD,
/* ACQ Changes */
ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
DV_ACQUISITION_COMPANY_NAME,
DV_ACQUISITION_DESCR,
/* Added New columns -Feb062020 */
SALES_MOTION_CD,
SUM(DV_NEW_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT),
SUM(DV_NEW_MULTI_YR_BKGS_AMT) ,
SUM(DV_RNWL_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT) ,
SUM(DV_RNWL_MULTI_YR_BKGS_AMT) ,
SUM(DV_OTHER_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT) ,
SUM(DV_OTHER_MULTI_YR_BKGS_AMT),
/*08-NOV-2020 START */
BUYING_PROGRAM_NAME,
/*08-NOV-2020 END */
SUM(DV_SVC_DEBKGS_ANNUAL_USD_AMT),  
SUM(DV_SVC_ERP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT),  
SUM(DV_SVC_POS_ANNUAL_USD_AMT),     
SUM(DV_SVC_DSV_ANNUAL_USD_AMT),     
SUM(DV_SVC_EIS_CM_ANNUAL_USD_AMT),  
SUM(DV_SVC_XAAS_ANNUAL_BKGS_USD_AMT),
SPLUNK_FLG--Splunk Identifier June 16th

FROM  $$STGDB.WI_MBR_DAILY_SUMMARY_INTERM
GROUP BY 
L0_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
IS_L0_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,   
IS_L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR ,  
IS_L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR , 
IS_L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR  ,
IS_L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR  ,
IS_L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR  ,
IS_L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR  ,
FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
FISCAL_WEEK_NAME,
CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLG,
SALES_REP_NUM,
ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,
IS_SALES_REP_NUM, 
IS_ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,                     
BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
SERVICE_FLG,
FMV_FLG,
PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
SOFTWARE_USAGE_TYPE_CD,
SOFTWARE_STACK_CD,
MONETIZATION_TYPE_CD,
SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,
ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,
PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_DESCR,
SALES_ADJ_CD,
MATCH_FLG,
TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
XCAT_FLG,
RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
ELA_FLG, 
DV_IS_FLG,
/* Adding New Columns As part of Feb Release */
CASE WHEN SALES_COVERAGE_CODE IN ('NOT REQUIRED','UNKNOWN') THEN 'OTHER' ELSE SALES_COVERAGE_CODE END, 
CASE WHEN SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CD IN ('NOT REQUIRED','UNKNOWN') THEN 'OTHER' ELSE SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CD END,
/* ACQ Changes */
ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
DV_ACQUISITION_COMPANY_NAME,
DV_ACQUISITION_DESCR,
/* Added New columns -Feb062020 */
SALES_MOTION_CD,
/*08-NOV-2020 START */
BUYING_PROGRAM_NAME,
/*08-NOV-2020 END */
SPLUNK_FLG--Splunk Identifier June 16th
